title: wedelia helianthoides
intro: Wedelia helianthoides, also known as the Sowbread or Wedelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a demulcent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent, which makes it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia helianthoides include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
